creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 239324
git diff for graphics/synfig

The git diff attached to this pr(1) upgrades graphics/synfig
from 1.4.2 to 1.4.4. This upgrade comes along with graphics/synfigstudio
and devel/etl/

CHANGELOG
https://github.com/synfig/synfig/blob/master/ChangeLog.md

port changes:
Makefile
distinfo
pkg-plist

That's it..

Thanks!

--Chris

P.S. I'm Maintainer. So approval is implicit. :-)

See also: bug #268803 and bug #268802
